name: Cobb Pawn & Gold, Inc
description_short: Cobb Pawn & Gold specializes in high-value collateral loans using fine jewelry, luxury watches, and firearms. Operating since 1982 in Marietta, GA, they position themselves as an upscale alternative to typical pawn shops.
description_long:
Cobb Pawn & Gold was founded in 1982 with a mission to operate as a fine jewelry store rather than a stereotypical pawn shop, emphasizing personal service and discretion. Over 33 years of operation, the company has built a reputation in the Atlanta area by focusing on high-value items and long-term customer relationships rather than quick-flip transactions. The business is located at 834 South Cobb Drive in Marietta, Georgia.

The company offers collateral-based loans primarily against fine jewelry, luxury watches, diamonds, and firearms. They advertise loans on boats, yachts, heavy equipment, and commercial tools. They also buy and sell jewelry, watches, diamonds, guns, and other merchandise through their retail showroom. Loan processing is described as fast, easy, and confidential, with jewelry fully insured and stored in bank vaults. They claim to offer competitive rates on high-value items and provide free valuations.

Cobb Pawn & Gold differentiates itself by claiming not to offer "scrap prices" for fine jewelry and positioning luxury loans as superior alternatives to typical pawnshop rates. They explicitly market to affluent customers, including athletes, executives, and business owners seeking discrete, quick access to cash. The company emphasizes professional, knowledgeable staff and a customer-first approach that encourages repeat business beyond initial loan transactions.

As a collateral-based lender, Cobb Pawn & Gold serves customers with tangible assets who need immediate cash without credit checks or traditional lending requirements. However, like all pawn operations, they retain ownership risk on pledged items and loan terms are inherently short-term. The business model depends on asset liquidation if loans aren't repaid, making it suitable only for customers willing to risk losing valuable possessions.
address: 834 S Cobb Dr SE, Marietta, GA 30060

company_info.headquarters: 834 S Cobb Dr SE, Marietta, GA 30060

pros: 33 years of established operating history in Marietta market
Bank vault storage for jewelry items with full insurance coverage
Advertises competitive rates specifically on high-value luxury items versus typical pawn shop rates
Offers multiple loan types: luxury loans, everyday loans, and title loans
Free valuation service for jewelry, watches, and antique firearms
Loans on diverse collateral including boats, yachts, equipment, and commercial tools
Strong online review presence (5-star verified Google reviews cited on homepage)
cons: Collateral-based lending carries risk of losing pledged items if loan terms aren't met
Limited to customers with valuable tangible assets; not accessible to those without collateral
Loan terms are inherently short-term, requiring relatively quick repayment versus traditional loans
No published interest rates or APR information disclosed on website
Retail showroom merchandise selection depends on customer pawned items, creating inventory variability
best_for: High-net-worth individuals and professionals needing quick, discrete access to cash against luxury watches or fine jewelry
Business owners requiring short-term capital secured by equipment or vehicles
Customers with valuable tangible assets (jewelry, firearms, collectibles) who prioritize speed and privacy over traditional lending processes
Individuals seeking alternatives to typical pawn shops with professional service and competitive valuations on premium items
diagnosis: Cobb Pawn & Gold is best suited for affluent customers and small business owners with valuable assets who need immediate cash and prioritize discretion and professional service over traditional lending. The main caveat is that all loans are collateral-based with genuine risk of asset forfeiture if repayment terms aren't met, and published loan terms, rates, and APRs are not disclosed online.
services: Luxury collateral loans against fine jewelry and Swiss watches
Everyday collateral loans on items of value
Purchase and sale of fine jewelry, diamonds, and precious metals
Purchase and sale of firearms (handguns, long guns, antique collections)
Loans on boats, yachts, and personal watercraft
Loans on heavy equipment, bobcats, tractors, and commercial tools
Free jewelry and watch valuation services
Bank vault storage and insurance for pledged jewelry
Estate jewelry and antique gun appraisals
